mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(CASE WHEN active THEN 1 END) as "activeRules", SUM(products_affected) as "totalProductsAffected", AVG(CASE WHEN active THEN discount_value END) as "avgDiscount", SUM(CASE WHEN active THEN revenue_impact END) as "totalRevenueImpact", COUNT(CASE WHEN has_conflict THEN 1 END) as "conflictCount" FROM hm_query.pricing_rule_flat
SELECT rule_type as "ruleType", COUNT(*) as "count" FROM hm_query.pricing_rule_flat WHERE active = true GROUP BY rule_type ORDER BY rule_type
SELECT rule_id as "id", name as "ruleName", rule_type as "ruleType", conflict_details as "conflictDetails" FROM hm_query.pricing_rule_flat WHERE has_conflict = true ORDER BY priority
